_meta.source: Mage Knight base game — Norowas skill tokens
_meta.note: Used for the solo dummy player's skill deck (EC-09-A-3). Effects mirror the physical tokens; 'unit_boost' and passive effects are informational until fully engine-supported.

skills.name: Forward March
skills.effect: Move 1 for each Ready and unwounded Unit you control, to a maximum of Move 3.

skills.name: Day Sharpshooting
skills.effect: Ranged Attack 2 (during the Day), or Ranged Attack 1 (at Night).

skills.name: Inspiration
skills.effect: Ready or Heal one of your Units.

skills.name: Bright Negotiation
skills.effect: Influence 3 (during the Day), or Influence 2 (at Night).

skills.name: Leaves in the Wind
skills.effect: Once a Round: gain a green crystal to your Inventory, or a white mana token.

skills.name: Whispers in the Treetops
skills.effect: Once a Round: gain a white crystal to your Inventory, or a green mana token.

skills.name: Leadership
skills.effect: When you activate a Unit: it gets Ranged Attack +1, Attack +2 or Block +3 added to its ability.

skills.name: Bonds of Loyalty
skills.effect: You have one extra Command token. The Unit recruited to it costs 5 less Influence.

skills.name: Prayer of Weather
skills.effect: Cooperative: until your next turn, the Move cost of one terrain type is reduced by 2 (minimum 1) for you, and by 1 for other players.
